title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Starbucks India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Starbucks India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Starbucks India International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Starbucks India International Enterprises:
Starbucks India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India International Enterprises!
